results.title: MergeTgt has no handling if TGTTOEXCHANGE is exceeded during the exchange period
results.reasoning: Yes. Audit item #2 (“TITN Insolvency via Unlimited TGT Deposits – No Cap Enforcement”) matches the reported issue exactly: onTokenTransfer accepts unlimited TGT without enforcing the TGT_TO_EXCHANGE/TITN_ARB cap, causing totalTitnClaimable to exceed available TITN and leaving late claimers unable to claim. It points to the same code path (MergeTgt.onTokenTransfer updating claimableTitn/totalTitnClaimable) and same failure mode (insolvency). Audit item #3 further captures the same consequence in withdrawRemainingTitn underflow, which the description also mentions. Enforcing a cap on total TGT deposits or on totalTitnClaimable (vs TITN_ARB/balance) would fix both, so the vulnerabilities are the same.
